scar.description: Gains HP when enemies die nearby. Larger, more monstrous form with bone spikes and dark crimson aura.
scar.mutation_description: Heals 4 HP when an enemy dies within 3 tiles.

idle: More.
The scent. Everywhere.
They're already dead. They don't know it yet.
I count them all.

bolt.description: Electric tiles jump to nearby tiles each turn. Crackling lightning arcs, glowing veins, floating sparks.
bolt.mutation_description: Charged tiles spread to one adjacent tile each turn.

idle: Everything is ELECTRIC and I am EVERYTHING!
I can feel every wire in the ground!
THE POWER! CAN YOU FEEL IT?!
I'm not fast anymore. I'm INSTANT.

null_kip.description: Void tiles erase terrain permanently. Warped silhouette, pieces of space collapsing, black distortion trails.
null_kip.mutation_description: Voided tiles permanently become void terrain. Movement cost 3 for non-void units.

idle: I consumed a piece of the world. It didn't resist.
What is the difference between me and emptiness?
Everything ends. I am the proof.
Do you remember what was here? Neither does the ground.

solen.description: Heals all allies standing on radiant tiles each turn. Brilliant golden aura, halo of light, warmth made visible.
solen.mutation_description: Allies on radiant tiles heal 3 HP at the start of each turn.

idle: Every scar you carry — I've been counting them.
The warmth is not mine. It's yours. I'm reflecting it.
I've watched empires fall and children grow. Both matter.
You are not alone. You were never alone.

thorn.description: Roots enemies standing on vine tiles. Thicker vines, crown of thorns, glowing green spores.
thorn.mutation_description: Enemies on overgrown tiles lose 1 movement and cannot flee combat.

idle: I have held this ground for longer than your bloodline.
The forest does not forget. I am the forest.
Patience. The slow things always win.
They will break against the roots. They always do.

dusk.description: Reveals enemy stats and weaknesses. Dark tiles reduce enemy accuracy. Sardonic, knowing, impossible to surprise.
dusk.mutation_description: Enemies on darkened tiles suffer -15 hit rate and -10 avoid.

deploy: I've seen this exact battle four hundred years ago.
Fine. Let me show you what I know.
idle: I've forgotten more wars than you've seen sunsets.
History doesn't repeat. People do.
Every commander makes the same mistake. Yours did too.
I remember everything. That's not a gift.

sleet.description: Frozen tiles spread outward each turn. Cracks of blue light, frost aura, heavier crystalline armor.
sleet.mutation_description: Frozen tiles spread to one adjacent tile each turn. Frozen tiles last 2 extra turns.

idle: The frost line is expanding. I've run the calculations.
Efficiency increased by 340%. I'm satisfied.
Every tile I touch remembers the cold.
They can't outrun the ice. I've measured.

the_first.description: Can judge enemies, permanently reducing their stats. The last witness becomes the final judge.
the_first.mutation_description: Awakening permanently reduces all surviving enemies' stats by 2.

idle: I have seen enough.
The record is complete.
...guilty.
